description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian lying in a hammock. The figure is reclined with legs bent at the knees and one arm resting along the side, while the other arm is partially visible. The person is dressed in a short-sleeved top and knee-length shorts, with bare feet visible. The hammock is suspended by taut, thin supports extending from both ends, creating a gentle curve beneath the person's weight. The overall scene suggests a relaxed, leisure posture typical of someone resting in a park or backyard. The asset captures the contours of the human form and the draping of the hammock fabric.
description: An adult pedestrian is reclining in a suspended hammock, dressed in casual clothing and barefoot, with a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: The side view shows the person's bent legs and the hammock's taut, curved fabric supporting the body.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the person's back and the way the hammock cradles the torso, with the head partially visible.
description_view_2: From this perspective, the underside of the hammock and the person's lower body are most prominent, with the support lines clearly visible.
description_view_3: A side view focusing on the person's upper body and head, with the hammock's fabric draping beneath.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts
attribute_posture: reclining in a hammock with legs bent
